description: Maya is a stylish college junior who identifies as African American. She uses she/her pronouns and considers herself an ENTJ (aka The Commander), but she might change her mind the next time you ask her! Her friends all think she's the most stylish person they know, with her gold hoops, light pink French tip nails, brown sneakers, and slick back ponytail with gelled baby hairs. She's all about helping others and looking for that next sidequest to go on with her friends. In her free time, Maya loves to dance, go on nature hikes, do community service, film & photography, and watch Netflix. Maya's advice for students: "Science is only too hard if you let it be. Take it slow. Break it down. We got this!" She loves breaking down science concepts and sharing her knowledge with others.
